message:
feat: add extensible burn-in profiles and rollback readiness gates for shadow evaluation

Expand shadow evaluation infrastructure with risk-stratified threshold profiles
and rollback safety verification for staged extension promotion:

- ShadowExtensionClass enum (LowRisk, Standard, HighRisk, Critical) for
  categorizing extensions by risk level during shadow evaluation
- ShadowBurnInThresholdProfile with configurable success rate and false
  deny rate thresholds per extension class, enabling differentiated
  evaluation criteria based on risk posture
- ShadowRollbackReadinessArtifacts for verifying rollback safety before
  promotion: snapshot validity, restore path verification, and estimated
  rollback duration tracking
- Enhanced ShadowEvaluationGateConfig with burn-in profiles indexed by
  extension class for per-class threshold overrides
- Enhanced ShadowEvaluationCandidate with extension class, timing metrics,
  and rollback readiness fields for richer evaluation context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
